constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient
At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value
Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words

reference_templates.title: Placeholder-only identification
reference_templates.notes: Empty label element; field identified only by placeholder attribute

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Reference DOM (Asterisk in sibling span): Required marker asterisk lives in sibling span, not inside label text Reference DOM (Other option reveal): Referral source Other checkbox reveals free-text input Reference DOM (Placeholder-only identification): Empty label element; field identified only by placeholder attribute Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: native-select-not-combobox, readonly-prefill, pill-yes-no, details-accordion, glued-label-text. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Asterisk in sibling span; Other option reveal; Placeholder-only identification.
